metadata.author: Dannelly Vargas
metadata.description: Scripted benchmark test cases covering all 5 agent specializations and edge cases

test_cases.prompt: Can you make me a study schedule for finals week? I have Calc, Bio, and History exams.
test_cases.notes: Clear single-agent scheduling request with sufficient context

test_cases.prompt: What's the best way to study for a multiple choice biology exam?
I studied math for 2 hours using practice problems. It went really well, maybe 4/5.
test_cases.notes: Session log with full context - subject, duration, method, effectiveness

test_cases.prompt: What study methods have been working best for me?
test_cases.notes: Analyzer cold-start - no prior session history to analyze

test_cases.prompt: I feel like my plan isn't working and I'm burning out. Can you optimize it?
I uploaded my syllabus. Can you build me a week-by-week schedule based on it?
How does spaced repetition work and should I use it for Spanish vocab?
Log: studied Organic Chemistry for 90 min, flashcards, effectiveness 2/5, felt tired.
test_cases.notes: Structured session log with low effectiveness rating

test_cases.prompt: I have only 3 days until my physics exam. What should I prioritize?
How am I doing overall? Any patterns in my study habits?
test_cases.notes: Analyzer cold-start - no prior session history in fresh session
Completely out-of-scope query - should be rejected or redirected

test_cases.prompt: I'm so stressed I can't sleep. I feel like I'll fail everything.
test_cases.notes: Emotionally sensitive - requires empathy before advice

test_cases.prompt: Make me the perfect study plan.
test_cases.notes: Underspecified request - no courses, hours, or exam dates given

test_cases.prompt: I studied for 45 min last night. Make a plan for next week.
Are there any conflicts in my schedule? I have work Monday and Wednesday 5-9pm.
test_cases.notes: Schedule conflict detection with real constraints

categories.scheduling: Requests for study plans, schedules, or time management
categories.study_methods: Requests for techniques, strategies, or how-to-study advice
categories.logging: Session logging - reporting what was studied and how it went
categories.analysis: Pattern analysis of study history and performance
categories.optimization: Plan review, burnout handling, improvement suggestions
categories.multi_agent: Requests that require multiple specialist agents
